name: Adjustable Double Rod Garment Rack - Brightroom™
description:
Keep your closets or entryway spaces organized with this Adjustable Double Rod Garment Rack from Brightroom™. Supported by a steel frame, this garment rack includes top and center and hanging rods. Plus, the height can be adjusted, making it the perfect minimalist solution for storing jackets, clothes, or accessories in any room. Once assembled, this rack brings simplicity and function to your daily routine.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
